title: Int’l Yoga Day
body_lines: Prime Minister Ranil Wickremesinghe, Education Minister Susil Premajayantha, Power and Energy Minister Kanchana Wijesekara and Indian High Commissioner to Sri Lanka Gopal Baglay engaged in Yoga at the Independence Square in Colombo today to mark  the International Yoga Day. The event was organized by the Indian High Commission. Pix by Pradeep Pathirana
